reasons: Gatotkaca can knock enemies airborne and pull fringe targets toward the center, helping Cici find two linked targets.
Cici can cast Curtain Call after Gatotkaca's landing to punish enemies forced close together.

proof.summary: Gatotkaca creates a grouped airborne setup, while Cici links two enemies and damages both with Yo-Yo Blitz.
worksBestWhen: Gatotkaca lands near two priority targets.
Cici waits for the knock-up or pull before casting Curtain Call.
failureCases: Gatotkaca lands on only one target.
Cici links a low-value target pair.
Enemies spread before Cici enters range.

reasons: Tigreal can group enemies, giving Cici an easier two-target Curtain Call setup.
Cici benefits from entering after Tigreal confirms the crowd-control window.

proof.summary: Tigreal starts the grouped fight, while Cici links and damages two controlled enemies.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal catches two or more enemies.
Cici is close enough to follow immediately.
failureCases: Cici arrives after the control ends.
Tigreal catches only the enemy tank.
Cici is focused before she builds sustained pressure.

reasons: Atlas can gather enemies into a position where Cici can link two heroes more reliably.
Cici's dual-target damage has better value when Atlas forces enemies into one zone.

proof.summary: Atlas groups targets first, then Cici uses Curtain Call to bind two enemies and continue damage.
worksBestWhen: Cici waits until the pull finishes.
failureCases: Atlas catches enemies outside Cici's range.
Enemies use disengage after the setup.

reasons: Angela helps Cici stay alive while Cici chases linked targets.
Cici benefits from attached protection because she often fights forward instead of from a safe backline position.

proof.summary: Angela keeps Cici alive during her extended chase and dual-target damage window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Cici fully commits.
Cici keeps damaging enemies to maintain skirmish pressure.
failureCases: Cici jumps into hard crowd control.
Angela attaches after Cici is already forced out.
Anti-heal and burst remove the sustain value.

reasons: Rafaela gives Cici movement and healing support for extended skirmishes.
Cici can keep chasing linked or slowed enemies more reliably with speed support.

proof.summary: Rafaela helps Cici stay in range during chase and kite patterns.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela stays near Cici's fight path.
Cici uses the speed window to keep safe spacing.
failureCases: Enemy burst kills Cici before healing matters.
Rafaela is forced to heal another target first.
